description: Add a reference for the R statistical software to your Juris-M library using the 'Computer Program' item type. The entry must include the following metadata: Title: 'R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing'; Programmer: 'R Core Team' (as an organization); Version: '4.3.0'; Company: 'R Foundation for Statistical Computing'; Place: 'Vienna, Austria'; Date: '2023'; and URL: 'https://www.R-project.org/'.

metadata.expected_title: R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing
